top_strength: Joel handled a messy opener gracefully, captured all address/logistics details cleanly, and got a booking locked for June 27.
coaching_note: Save Your Ass pitch is completely absent — the customer literally asked 'is there anything I need to do to be prepped?' and Joel missed the perfect opening for the full prep speech.
phone_presence_notes: Polite and reasonably organized but minimal warmth — used Katie's name once, no rapport-building moments.
